response: To determine the total number of writing prompts needed, we first calculate the number of groups. With 24 residents divided into groups of 6, there are 4 groups in total. Emily initially assigns 3 prompts to each group, resulting in 12 prompts (4 groups × 3 prompts). She also has a set of 10 extra prompts to be shared equally among the 4 groups. Adding the initial 12 prompts to the 10 extra prompts gives a total of 22 prompts required for the session. This collection serves as a small library of creative ideas for the residents. By organizing this library of prompts effectively, Emily ensures every participant has ample material to explore their thoughts. The END.
